# With spice.restack.method=merge, a multi-branch restack
# (here 'gs upstack restack') with a dirty worktree completes
# without a checkout error, and the uncommitted change survives.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2024-05-27T18:24:42Z'

mkdir repo
cd repo
git init
git add init.txt dirty.txt
git commit -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

# use the merge method for restacks.
git config spice.restack.method merge

# stack: main -> a -> b.
# 'a' and 'b' each add an independent file.
cp $WORK/extra/a.txt a.txt
git add a.txt
gs bc -m a

cp $WORK/extra/b.txt b.txt
git add b.txt
gs bc -m b

# advance trunk with a change to a file that neither branch nor the
# dirty change touches, so the merges and the autostash pop are clean.
gs trunk
cp $WORK/extra/init.new.txt init.txt
git add init.txt
git commit -m 'Change init'

# make an uncommitted change to a tracked file before restacking.
gs branch checkout a
cp $WORK/extra/dirty.new.txt dirty.txt
git status --porcelain
cmp stdout $WORK/golden/dirty-status.txt

# restack the upstack of 'a': both 'a' and 'b' get merge commits.
# without the autostash wrap, the dirty tree would break the checkout
# of 'b' after 'a' is merged.
gs upstack restack
stderr 'a: restacked on main'
stderr 'b: restacked on a'

# no merge was left pending and no conflict prompt was shown.
! exists .git/MERGE_HEAD
! stderr 'There was a conflict while merging'

# the uncommitted change survives in the worktree.
cmp dirty.txt $WORK/extra/dirty.new.txt
git status --porcelain
cmp stdout $WORK/golden/dirty-status.txt

# both branches carry merge commits of their new bases.
git graph --branches
cmp stdout $WORK/golden/graph.txt

-- repo/init.txt --
initial init

-- repo/dirty.txt --
clean dirty

-- extra/a.txt --
a contents

-- extra/b.txt --
b contents

-- extra/init.new.txt --
changed init

-- extra/dirty.new.txt --
dirty changes

-- golden/dirty-status.txt --
 M dirty.txt
-- golden/graph.txt --
*   8952528 (b) Merge branch 'a' into b
|\  
| *   3856e6c (HEAD -> a) Merge branch 'main' into a
| |\  
| | * 0515afa (main) Change init
* | | 0201d12 b
|/ /  
* / a14c6cc a
|/  
* 49cb34e Initial commit
